name: cognitive-pilot
description: OpenClaw plugin for cognitive enhancement and guided thought processing

scripts.clean: node --input-type=module -e "import { rmSync } from 'node:fs'; rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true }); rmSync('dist-tests', { recursive: true, force: true });"
scripts.test: npm run clean && tsc -p tsconfig.test.json && node --test dist-tests/tests/**/*.test.js
